⚙ Process & Tools

How it's built

Everything at Galapptic — apps, games, podcasts, and infrastructure — is designed and shipped by one person. The secret isn't working harder; it's working smarter. Modern AI tools are used as force multipliers: I define the vision, make every creative and technical decision, and use AI to execute faster and at a higher quality than would otherwise be possible solo.

This is what it looks like when strong product thinking meets modern tooling — not a shortcut, but a genuine skill in knowing what to build, how to direct it, and how to ship something people actually want to use.

🤖
AI-Assisted Development

App logic, game mechanics, UI, and automated pipelines are all developed using conversational AI as a co-developer. The key skill is knowing what to ask for, how to evaluate the output, and how to iterate toward a high-quality result.

Every line of the final product is reviewed, tested, and shaped by me.

🎙
Automated Content Pipelines

All five podcasts are researched, scripted, voiced, produced, and published automatically — every single day. Building this pipeline required designing a system architecture that scales across multiple shows simultaneously.

Zero daily manual effort after the system was designed and built.

☁️
Cloud Infrastructure

Apps and pipelines run on modern cloud infrastructure with automated scheduling, deployment, and content delivery. Designed for reliability and scale from day one.

Production-grade infrastructure, solo-managed.

🎨
AI-Assisted Visual Design

App illustrations, icons, and art assets are generated using state-of-the-art image models with carefully engineered prompts. Lore Weave alone contains 491 unique illustrations, each tied to a specific story moment.

Every image is directed and curated — not random generation.

📱
Mobile App Development

Native and cross-platform mobile apps built using modern frameworks, from prototype through App Store submission. Game logic, animations, economy systems, and tutorial flows all developed and iterated in the same workflow.

From concept to shipped app, end to end.

📈
Growth & Distribution

Automated social media content creation, short-form video generation, and podcast distribution across all major platforms. Marketing and reach built into the production pipeline, not bolted on after.

Consistent daily output across 5+ channels simultaneously.

Galapptic
© 2026 Galapptic LLC
★ Our story

Making the cosmos fun.

Galapptic started as a question: how much can one person actually build? The answer turned out to be a lot — apps on the App Store, a network of daily podcasts, automated production systems, and a library of original illustrated stories. All of it designed, built, and shipped solo.

The work here is a genuine learning journey. Every project pushed into new territory — mobile development, cloud infrastructure, content pipelines, game design, illustration direction. The tools evolved, the skills compounded, and the output kept growing.

None of this is about doing less. It's about doing more with intention — knowing what to build, understanding the tools deeply enough to get real results, and caring enough about the craft to make things people actually want to use.

🚀
The mission

Make learning feel like play. Build things worth using. Ship with intention.

⚡
The approach

Strong creative vision + modern tooling = more than any one person should be able to ship.

🌌
Why Galapptic?

Because the universe is vast, and there's always something new worth building in it.

📈
Always growing

New apps, new shows, new ideas. The portfolio keeps expanding — check back often.
